page_metadata.biotools__summary: FlexPred is a web-server for predicting residue positions involved in conformational switches in proteins.The server accepts either a protein sequence or a PDB file to predict residue positions involved in conformational switches.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FlexPred is a web-server for predicting residue positions involved in conformational switches in proteins.The server accepts either a protein sequence or a PDB file to predict residue positions involved in conformational switches.
